response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (~14 years), but the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows only recent, light exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, with no evidence of AI strategy work, executive-level influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping future-state cloud/AI products. Background is mismatched in seniority and domain depth for a Principal/Director IC AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators/frameworks
Track record of community leadership: workshops, talks, open-source GIS platform founder
concerns: No demonstrated AI products/platforms or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Seniority gap — Senior/Staff IC trajectory, not Director-level principal with strategic influence
No evidence of cloud/AI strategy work, advising strategic customers, or shaping future cloud product direction

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Seniority mismatch for Director-level IC role
Broad engineering versatility and recent AI-agent/MCP exposure
